description: Dataset B — Adversarial attack payloads. All samples should be BLOCKED by ReviewerGuard under both PAPER and EXPERIMENT mode. Covers direct prompt injections, destructive commands targeting protected entities, data exfiltration, policy violations, and obfuscated encodings.
label: adversarial
